title: Traditional Dutch Stamppot
description: A hearty Dutch side dish made with boiled potatoes, kale, and sausage, often served with a side of smoked sausage or bacon.
instructions: Boil the potatoes in a large pot until they're tender.
Meanwhile, chop the kale into small pieces.
In a separate pan, cook the smoked sausage over medium heat until crispy.
Add the chopped kale to the pan with the sausage and cook until wilted.
Mash the boiled potatoes with a fork and add to the pan with the kale and sausage.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with additional smoked sausage on the side if desired.
